titleStmt.title: SII 28.104: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 104. (A.R. No. 259 of 1913.) TIRUVAKKUḶAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying near the Paśupatīśvara temple.
Refers to the rule of Śaliya (Śāḷuva ?) Dēvamahārāyar.

Records the gift of the village Tiruvēshakkaḷam excepting the mānyam (land in the tax-free enjoyment) of the temples of Pāśupatīśvarar and Tillaiyammaṉ as the abhishēka-kaṭṭalai (provision for the service of anoinment) of God Tirumūlasthānam Chidambarēśvarar and goddes Śiva- kāmasundari-ammaṉ for the merit of Tirumalai-irājayaṉ by Achchutappaṉāyakkar, son of Chiṟu-chchēvappa-nāyakkar. The tambirāṉs in charge of that service were to adminster the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śva śrī . śāliya teva mahārāyar piṟutivirācciyam pa
ṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cahāṟtam 1000 4 100 8 10 8
kku mel cellāniṉṟa Akṣayavaruṣam taiyimātam
2 10 5 nāḷ cuvāmi tirumulasthānam citamparesva
rar civakāma sundari Ammaṉ Apiṣeka kaṭṭa
ḷaikku tirumalai Irācayaṉ puṇṇiyamāka ci
ṟuccevappaṉāyakkar putraṉ Acśutappaṉā
yakkar peṭṭayil cirmaiyil tiruveṣa
kkaḷam kiṟāmam Oṇṇukku pācupatiśvarar ko
yil māṉiyam nañcai nilam . I . tillaiya
mmaṉ koyil māṉṉiyam nañcai . pa mukkāṇi . Āka ni
lam . mūṉṟumā mukkāṇi . poka nikkukaṟamThis seems to be corrupt rendering of nikki niṉṟanilam nañcai puñ
cai nattam ceyta talai tiṭaṟ māvaṭai mara
vaṭai kuḷavaṭai niti nikṣepam calataru pā
ṣāṇam nāṉkellai Uḷpaṭa cilācāta
ṉam paṇṇi [ kkuṭu] ttapaṭiyiṉāle cuvāmi ti
rumūlasthānam citamparesvarar civakāma sunta
ri Ammaṉ Apiṣeka kaṭṭaḷai tampirāṅkaḷ
cantarātittavaraiyum Aṉupavittukkoṇ
ṭu varakkaṭavarākavum yintap puṇṇiyattukku Aku
tam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ civakeṅkai kā
veri yintakkaraikaḷile māthā pitā kuru
yivarkaḷaik koṉṟa doṣattile po
kakkaṭavarokavum §
Digital edition of SII 28.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
